task.title: Resolve PR conflicts around platform tradeoff copy

events.content: Resolved merge conflicts by accepting main trajectory artifacts and merging trajectory index: Resolved merge conflicts by accepting main trajectory artifacts and merging trajectory index

raw.question: Resolved merge conflicts by accepting main trajectory artifacts and merging trajectory index
raw.chosen: Resolved merge conflicts by accepting main trajectory artifacts and merging trajectory index
raw.reasoning: Only conflicts were trajectory records and index metadata. The requested platform tradeoff sentence was not present in the branch or merged main checkout, so there was no prose conflict to resolve.

retrospective.summary: Merged origin/main into the PR branch, resolved trajectory-only conflicts, confirmed the requested platform tradeoff copy was not present locally, and reran focused Codex fallback plus agent-management tests successfully.
